templates.title: 📝 How to Win Public Tenders on BlueX
templates.summary: Here is a professional Swiss tender bid proposal response template customized for your provider profile:
structure: 2. Clear Breakdown of Labor Hours + Materials Cost
templates.sampleTemplate:
Grüezi!

I would be delighted to undertake your project in Canton {canton}.

📊 Estimated Cost Breakdown:
- Labor: {estimatedHours} hrs @ CHF {hourlyRate}/hr = CHF {laborTotal}
- Materials & Equipment: CHF {materialsEstimate}
- Total Estimated Investment: CHF {grandTotal} (incl. 8.1% Swiss MwSt)

🛡️ Guarantee & Compliance:
- Verified BlueX Provider with CHF 5,000,000 Swiss General Liability Insurance.
- 2-year warranty on all executed craftsmanship.

📅 Earliest Available Start Date: Next Monday at 08:00 AM.

Best regards,
{providerName}
{tradeCategory} Specialist
actionPoints: ⚡ **Submit Proposals Early**: 70% of public tenders in Switzerland are awarded to proposals submitted within 3 hours of posting.
📋 **Itemize Labor & Material**: Swiss clients strongly prefer transparent cost breakdowns over bulk lump sums.
